query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fiumi) as fiumi_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM affluenti) as affluenti_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reinvestimenti) as reinvestimenti_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifiche) as notifiche_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alertConfig) as alertConfig_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenari) as scenari_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenarioSnapshots) as scenarioSnapshots_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM impostazioni) as impostazioni_count;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yzSB6Fs2no5uLXC.0b226ff0a0ad --database 3quDARJ9wiga9RVYRWFYFH --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fiumi) as fiumi_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM affluenti) as affluenti_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reinvestimenti) as reinvestimenti_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifiche) as notifiche_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alertConfig) as alertConfig_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenari) as scenari_count,
